title: Suttum Sudar Vizhi Lyrics Siraichalai
stanzas:
suttum sudar vizhi
paarvaiyile thoondilidum devi
kathum kadal alai
thaandi vandhum
theenduthu un aavi. (2)

nilavai pottum vaithu
pavala pattum katti
arugil nirkkum unnai
varavaerppen naan
varavaerppen naan

suttum sudar vizhi
paarvaiyile thoondilidum devi
kathum kadal alai
thaandi vandhum
theenduthu un aavi.

unadhu peyare mandhiram
ena oadhuven oadhuven
minminigalil nam ninaivinai
thaeduvaen thaeduvaen (2)

sandhangalil nanaiyuthe
mounangal thaagamaai.
mannan mugam thondri varum
kannile deepamaai

indrum unai naan
paaduven geethanjaliyaai
uyire uyire
priyamae sagi.

iru vizhigalil
uyir vazhiyuthu
oomaiyaai oomaiyaai.
ulmadiyinil malar
vizhunthadhu sogamaai
sogamaai. (2)

vinnulagam eriyuthe
pournami thaangumaa
indru enthan sooriyan
kaalaiyil thoongumo.

kanavil unai naan
serndhida imaiye thadaiyaa
virindhaal siragai
ingu siluvaiyaa.

suttum sudar vizhi
paarvaiyile thoondilidum devi
kathum kadal alai
thaandi vandhum
theenduthu un aavi. (2)

nilavai pottum vaithu
pavala pattum katti
arugil nirkkum unnai
varavaerppen naan
varavaerppen naan

suttum sudar vizhi
paarvaiyile thoondilidum devi
kathum kadal alai
thaandi vandhum
theenduthu un aavi (2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Suttum Sudar Vizhi conveys themes of love and longing, expressing deep emotions associated with romantic connections.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Siraichalai, the song reflects the protagonist's feelings of love and desire, enhancing the emotional depth of the storyline.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by the talented K.S. Chitra and composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

When was the song released?

Suttum Sudar Vizhi was released on March 5, 1996.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Suttum Sudar Vizhi, the protagonist expresses profound emotions of love and longing, beautifully captured through K.S. Chitra's soulful rendition. The song plays a pivotal role in Siraichalai, enhancing the narrative by showcasing the depth of romantic feelings. With Ilaiyaraaja's exquisite composition, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and tenderness. This timeless melody resonates with anyone who has experienced the complexities of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Suttum Sudar Vizhi from Siraichalai is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With K.S. Chitra's enchanting vocals and Ilaiyaraaja's masterful composition, this song creates an ethereal atmosphere that resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the magic of this timeless classic that beautifully intertwines emotion and artistry.
stanzaMeanings: In your beautiful eyes, the goddess comes and crosses the waves of the sea, bringing your essence with her.
I will wait for you, standing close with the moon and the pearl necklace.
Can we think of coming near the flower? Can we push away the king and give it to you?
In your beautiful eyes, the goddess comes and crosses the waves of the sea, bringing your essence with her.
Your name is a spell, I will chant it, searching for our memories in the twinkling stars.
In the silence of the gatherings, the stillness becomes a longing. The king's face appears like a light in the eyes.
Today, I will sing for you, my life, my dear, like a melody.
In your beautiful eyes, don't sleep all day, my dear.
I have come to sing for the golden moon, my dear.
In two eyes, life flows silently, silently. The flower in the heart has fallen sadly, sadly.
Is the universe burning? Will the full moon endure? Will my sun sleep in this morning?
In dreams, I want to join you, if I spread my wings, will they become a symbol here?
In your beautiful eyes, the goddess comes and crosses the waves of the sea, bringing your essence with her.
I will wait for you, standing close with the moon and the pearl necklace.
In your beautiful eyes, the goddess comes and crosses the waves of the sea, bringing your essence with her.
